Hosted model

TriTalk miniGPT Live

This version uses the v0.2.2 model and runs through a hosted Hugging Face Space rather than inside your browser.

It has a wider embedding size, a longer context window, and a better validation loss than the original browser demo.

Model snapshot

6,093 subword tokens • 8 layers • 320 embedding width • 53.7 MB weights

Best validation loss so far: 4.254. This is the hosted v0.2.2 checkpoint.
